014 * limitations under the License.
015 */
016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo;
017
018import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonAnyGetter;
019import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonAnySetter;
020import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;
021import org.bitcoinj.base.Address;
022import org.bitcoinj.base.Coin;
023import org.bitcoinj.base.Sha256Hash;
024
025import java.time.Instant;
026import java.util.HashMap;
027import java.util.List;
028import java.util.Map;
029import java.util.Optional;
030
031// TODO: Merge/reconcile with WalletTransactionInfo
032// TODO: Consider making more record-like
033/**
034 * (Mostly) Immutable representation of BitcoinTransaction info JSON
035 * <p>
036 * It is not fully-immutable because of {@link #addOtherInfo(String, Object)} which should only be used by Jackson
037 * when deserializing.
038 * <p>
039 * This is returned by {@code BitcoinClient.listTransactions()}.
040 */
041public class BitcoinTransactionInfo {
042    private final boolean           involvesWatchOnly;
043    private final Address           address;
044    private final String            category;
045    private final Coin              amount;
046    private final String            label;
047    private final int               vout;
048    private final Coin              fee;
049    private final int               confirmations;
050    private final boolean           generated;
051    private final boolean           trusted;
052    private final Sha256Hash        blockHash;
053    private final int               blockHeight;
054    private final int               blockIndex;
055    private final Instant              blockTime;
056    private final Sha256Hash            txId;
057    private final List<Sha256Hash>      walletConflicts;
058    private final Instant               time;
059    private final Instant               timeReceived;
060    private final String                comment;
061    private final String                bip125Replaceable;
062    private final boolean               abandoned;
063    private final Map<String, Object>   otherInfo;
064
065    public BitcoinTransactionInfo(@JsonProperty("involvesWatchonly")    boolean     involvesWatchOnly,
066                                  @JsonProperty("address")              Address     address,
067                                  @JsonProperty("category")             String      category,
068                                  @JsonProperty("amount")               Coin        amount,
069                                  @JsonProperty("label")                String      label,
070                                  @JsonProperty("vout")                 int         vout,
071                                  @JsonProperty("fee")                  Coin        fee,
072                                  @JsonProperty("confirmations")        int         confirmations,
073                                  @JsonProperty("generated")            boolean     generated,
074                                  @JsonProperty("trusted")              boolean     trusted,
075                                  @JsonProperty("blockhash")            Sha256Hash  blockHash,
076                                  @JsonProperty("blockheight")          int         blockHeight,
077                                  @JsonProperty("blockindex")           int         blockIndex,
078                                  @JsonProperty("blockTime")            long        blockTime,
079                                  @JsonProperty("txid")                 Sha256Hash  txId,
080                                  @JsonProperty("walletconflicts")      List<Sha256Hash> walletConflicts,
081                                  @JsonProperty("time")                 long        time,
082                                  @JsonProperty("timereceived")         long        timeReceived,
083                                  @JsonProperty("comment")              String      comment,
084                                  @JsonProperty("bip125-replaceable")   String      bip125Replaceable,
085                                  @JsonProperty("abandoned")            boolean     abandoned)
086    {
087        this.involvesWatchOnly = involvesWatchOnly;
088        this.address = address;
089        this.category = category;
090        this.amount = amount;
091        this.label = label;
092        this.vout = vout;
093        this.fee = fee;
094        this.confirmations = confirmations;
095        this.generated = generated;
096        this.trusted = trusted;
097        this.blockHash = blockHash;
098        this.blockHeight = blockHeight;
099        this.blockIndex = blockIndex;
100        this.blockTime = Instant.ofEpochSecond(blockTime);
101        this.txId = txId;
102        this.walletConflicts = walletConflicts;
103        this.time = Instant.ofEpochSecond(time);
104        this.timeReceived = Instant.ofEpochSecond(timeReceived);
105        this.comment = comment;
106        this.bip125Replaceable = bip125Replaceable;
107        this.abandoned = abandoned;
108        this.otherInfo = new HashMap<>();
109    }
110
111    @JsonAnySetter
112    public void addOtherInfo(String propertyKey, Object value) {
113        this.otherInfo.put(propertyKey, value);
114    }
115
116    @JsonAnyGetter
117    public Map<String, Object> getOtherInfo() {
118        return otherInfo;
119    }
120
121    public boolean isInvolvesWatchOnly() {
122        return involvesWatchOnly;
123    }
124
125    public Address getAddress() {
126        return address;
127    }
128
129    public String getCategory() {
130        return category;
131    }
132
133    public Coin getAmount() {
134        return amount;
135    }
136
137    public String getLabel() {
138        return (label != null) ? label.replace("\n", "") : null;
139    }
140
141    public int getVout() {
142        return vout;
143    }
144
145    public Coin getFee() {
146        return fee;
147    }
148
149    public int getConfirmations() {
150        return confirmations;
151    }
152
153    public boolean isGenerated() {
154        return generated;
155    }
156
157    public boolean isTrusted() {
158        return trusted;
159    }
160
161    public Sha256Hash getBlockHash() {
162        return blockHash;
163    }
164
165    public int getBlockHeight() {
166        return blockHeight;
167    }
168
169    public int getBlockIndex() {
170        return blockIndex;
171    }
172
173    public Instant getBlockTime() {
174        return blockTime;
175    }
176
177    public Sha256Hash getTxId() {
178        return txId;
179    }
180
181    public List<Sha256Hash> getWalletConflicts() {
182        return walletConflicts;
183    }
184
185    public Instant getTime() {
186        return time;
187    }
188
189    public Instant getTimeReceived() {
190        return timeReceived;
191    }
192
193    public Optional<String> getComment() {
194        return Optional.ofNullable(comment);
195    }
196
197    public String isBip125Replaceable() {
198        return bip125Replaceable;
199    }
200
201    public boolean isAbandoned() {
202        return abandoned;
203    }
204}
